### COMPOSITION INTENT FOR THIS CYCLE

Active act: opening ‚ÄĒ ground in shadow (Establish stillness on a near-tonic A. A single solitary anchor in deep shadow ‚ÄĒ moonlight as a thin line, or a head bowed. Leave generous space; the room is just beginning to listen.)
